nws.detailedForecast: A chance of showers and thunderstorms between 7pm and 10pm, then showers and thunderstorms between 10pm and 5am. Some of the storms could be severe. Mostly cloudy. Low around 59, with temperatures rising to around 61 overnight. Southwest wind 12 to 26 mph, with gusts as high as 38 mph. Chance of precipitation is 100%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.
